::: hero-text

**MS Digital Marketing - Cal Poly Pomona**

I am a marketing procurement professional leveraging data analytics to drive strategic supplier and agency relationships. I manage vendor strategy, agency partnerships, and sourcing across key tentpole events and high-visibility product launches.
:::
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## About Me

I hold a Bachelor’s in Business Administration from the University of California, Riverside & and am currently pursuing my Master’s in Digital Marketing at Cal Poly Pomona.

Outside of work & school, I enjoy trying new restaurants around Southern California, traveling, and making my daily matcha drink!

## Skills

::: skills-grid
::: skill-card
### Analytics - Software

R, Quarto, Shiny, Tableau, SQL
:::

::: skill-card
### Google Analytics 

GA4, BigQuery, LookerStudio
:::
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Education

::: education-block
**Master of Science in Digital Marketing**\
California State Polytechnic University, Pomona - *Exp. 2026*

**Bachelor of Science, Business Administration**\
University of California, Riverside - 2021

## Projects

Explore my work using the tabs above — including an interactive **Quarto Dashboard**, a **Shiny App**, and an **essay on Shinylive**.
